About
Intelligence
Request Quote
ABOUT XRT GROUP — EST. 2018

Global Commodity
Infrastructure

XRT Group was built to eliminate the structural opacity of traditional commodity brokerage. We operate a vertically integrated procurement platform across three continental hubs, combining direct-origin sourcing with precision logistics and institutional compliance frameworks.

CORPORATE STRUCTURE
Entity
XRT Group LLC
Incorporated
Houston, TX USA
Operational Since
2018
Active Hubs
3 (HOU / RTM / SGP)
CORPORATE HISTORY

Operational Timeline

2018
Founded

XRT Group incorporated in Houston, TX. Initial focus: crude oil and refined product procurement for Latin American downstream clients.

2019
Rotterdam Hub Opened

European operations center established in Rotterdam, providing direct access to ARA barge market and North Sea crude streams.

2020
FATF Compliance Framework

Full AML/KYC compliance infrastructure deployed. Onboarded first Tier-1 banking counterparties under ISDA master agreements.

2021
Agricultural Desk Launch

Expanded into grain and oilseed procurement. GAFTA membership secured. USDA AMS certified agent status acquired.

2022
Singapore Hub Operational

Asia-Pacific operations center activated in Singapore Free Trade Zone. Palm oil and vegetable oil trading desk launched.

2023
ISO 9001:2015 Certified

Quality management system certified across all three operational hubs. SGS, Bureau Veritas, and Intertek integration finalized.

2024
Structured Finance Desk

Pre-export financing and LC structuring capabilities added.

2025
Platform Expansion

Proprietary Automated Routing Protocol (ARP) and Risk Mitigation Matrix (RMM) deployed. 643 verified suppliers in registry.

GLOBAL INFRASTRUCTURE

Hub Network & Operations

HOU
LIVE
HOUSTON
USA — UTC-6 (CST)
PRIMARY FOCUS AREAS
  • Energy Commodities
  • Structured Trade Finance
  • Americas Origination

For inquiries related to this hub, please schedule a call with our desk.

RTM
LIVE
ROTTERDAM
NETHERLANDS — UTC+1 (CET)
PRIMARY FOCUS AREAS
  • ARA Barge Market
  • European Distribution
  • Customs & AEO

For inquiries related to this hub, please schedule a call with our desk.

SGP
LIVE
SINGAPORE
SINGAPORE — UTC+8 (SST)
PRIMARY FOCUS AREAS
  • Palm Oil & Vegetable Oils
  • APAC Logistics Hub
  • Bunker Fuel

For inquiries related to this hub, please schedule a call with our desk.

REGULATORY FRAMEWORK

Compliance & Certification Matrix

FRAMEWORK / CODEGOVERNING BODYSTATUSOPERATIONAL DETAIL
AML/KYCFATF / FinCENACTIVEEnhanced Due Diligence on all counterparties. SAR filing capability.
OFAC ScreeningUS TreasuryACTIVEReal-time SDN list screening on all transactions and entities.
EU 5AMLDEuropean Banking AuthorityACTIVEFull compliance with EU Anti-Money Laundering Directives.
C-TPATUS CBPCERTIFIEDCustoms-Trade Partnership Against Terrorism. Tier 2 member.
AEODutch Customs (BVLNI)CERTIFIEDAuthorised Economic Operator for Rotterdam gateway.
ISO 9001:2015SGS / Certification BodyCERTIFIEDQuality management system across all three hubs.
GAFTA MemberGrain & Feed Trade Assoc.ACTIVEStandard contract terms for grain and oilseed trade.
FOSFA MemberFederation of Oils & FatsACTIVEArbitration and standard terms for oils and fats trade.
LEGAL DISCLAIMER

XRT Group LLC operates in strict compliance with applicable international trade sanctions, anti-money laundering regulations, and export control laws. All counterparties are subject to mandatory KYC/AML screening prior to engagement. Transactions involving sanctioned jurisdictions, entities, or individuals are strictly prohibited. XRT Group reserves the right to decline any transaction without disclosure of reason in compliance with OFAC regulations.

START PROCUREMENT
Schedule a call with an XRT desk.

RTM — Rotterdam, NLUTC+1
SGP — Singapore, SGPUTC+8
